Package com.enovka.gemini4j.domain

Class Candidate

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.Candidate
  • public class Candidate
extends Object
    A response candidate generated from the model.
    Author:
    Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>

    • Method Detail

      • builder

        public static Candidate.CandidateBuilder builder()

      • toBuilder

        public Candidate.CandidateBuilder toBuilder()

      • getContent

        public Content getContent()
        Output only. Generated content returned from the model.

      • getFinishReason

        public FinishReasonEnum getFinishReason()
        Optional. Output only. The reason why the model stopped generating tokens.

        If empty, the model has not stopped generating the tokens.

      • getSafetyRatings

        public List<SafetyRating> getSafetyRatings()
        List of ratings for the safety of a response candidate.

        There is at most one rating per category.

      • getCitationMetadata

        public CitationMetadata getCitationMetadata()
        Output only. Citation information for a model-generated candidate.

        This field may be populated with recitation information for any text included in the content. These are passages that are "recited" from copyrighted material in the foundational LLM's training data.

      • getTokenCount

        public Integer getTokenCount()
        Output only. Token count for this candidate.

      • getGroundingAttributions

        public List<GroundingAttribution> getGroundingAttributions()
        Output only. Attribution information for sources that contributed to a grounded answer.

        This field is populated for GenerateAnswer calls.

      • getIndex

        public Integer getIndex()
        Output only. Index of the candidate in the list of candidates.

      • setContent

        public Candidate setContent​(Content content)
        Output only. Generated content returned from the model.
        Returns:
        this.

      • setFinishReason

        public Candidate setFinishReason​(FinishReasonEnum finishReason)
        Optional. Output only. The reason why the model stopped generating tokens.

        If empty, the model has not stopped generating the tokens.

        Returns:
        this.

      • setSafetyRatings

        public Candidate setSafetyRatings​(List<SafetyRating> safetyRatings)
        List of ratings for the safety of a response candidate.

        There is at most one rating per category.

        Returns:
        this.

      • setCitationMetadata

        public Candidate setCitationMetadata​(CitationMetadata citationMetadata)
        Output only. Citation information for a model-generated candidate.

        This field may be populated with recitation information for any text included in the content. These are passages that are "recited" from copyrighted material in the foundational LLM's training data.

        Returns:
        this.

      • setTokenCount

        public Candidate setTokenCount​(Integer tokenCount)
        Output only. Token count for this candidate.
        Returns:
        this.

      • setGroundingAttributions

        public Candidate setGroundingAttributions​(List<GroundingAttribution> groundingAttributions)
        Output only. Attribution information for sources that contributed to a grounded answer.

        This field is populated for GenerateAnswer calls.

        Returns:
        this.

      • setIndex

        public Candidate setIndex​(Integer index)
        Output only. Index of the candidate in the list of candidates.
        Returns:
        this.
